analysis.reasoning:
Core message: An informational tweet announcing EU home affairs ministers will discuss migration/asylum pact, cooperation with non-EU countries on migration, and EU police cooperation. It is procedural and agenda-setting, without evaluative claims.
EU1 (EU is a successful story): Not promoted; no reference to history, achievements, or overcoming obstacles.
EU2 (EU is united): Not promoted; no claim of agreement or unity, only that ministers will discuss items.
EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens): Partially relevant topic-wise (migration, police cooperation) but the tweet does not claim benefits, effectiveness, or usefulness; it’s neutral. So not promoted.
EU4 (avant-garde actor): No pioneering or leadership claim.
EU5 (global champion of fair causes): Not mentioned.
EU6 (contributes to a better world): Cooperation with non-EU countries is mentioned, but without claims of global benefit or contribution; thus not promoted.
Conclusion: No listed narrative is explicitly promoted.
